channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: No longer sick, Dodgers' Mookie Betts hits a pair of '160-pound homers' as he works to gain weight
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Mookie Betts is no longer ailing, finally able to keep food down and eating up a storm to pack on the weight he dropped while battling a stomach virus during the first two weeks of the season. And, as the eight-time All-Star reminded everyone, “I'm still good at baseball.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Milos Uzan's late bucket on inbound play sends Houston into Elite Eight with 62-60 win over Purdue
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Houston spent time this week practicing an inbound play that coach Kelvin Sampson thought his team might need against Purdue. Milos Uzan, the third option, ran it to perfection.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Ring bling: Dodgers show off glittering World Series rings in pregame ceremony
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani and Clayton Kershaw joined their Los Angeles Dodgers teammates in sticking their fists out to show off their glittering World Series rings in a ceremony Friday night.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: CMU men's lacrosse escapes Concorida as Maverick women dominate CSU Pueblo
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Colorado Mesa's Men's Lacrosse team looked in full control on their way to a sixth win when they held a 7-3 second-half lead over RMAC foe Concordia University Irvine. Then came a Golden Eagle onslaught. Three quick goals and CUI was within one.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Auburn’s explosive 39-17 run topples Michigan basketball, sending Tigers to Elite 8
item.description: The No. 5 seed Michigan Wolverines have been eliminated by the No. 1 seed Auburn Tigers 78-65, snapping their five-game winning streak in the process.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: Alysa Liu delivers the US its first women's figure skating world championship in nearly 2 decades
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Alysa Liu skated around the ice in disbelief, her golden dress shimmering in the lights of TD Garden, and the appreciative roar from a sellout crowd reminded her why she had returned to the sport following a nearly two-year retirement.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Utah HC loses to defending champs in OT, 2-1
item.description: SUNRISE, Fla. (AP) - Sam Bennett scored his second goal of the game off an assist from Brad Marchand at 4:18 of overtime to give the Florida Panthers a 2-1 win over the Utah Hockey Club at Amerant Bank Arena on Friday. By earning one point, Utah is now nine points behind St.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Tennessee is heading back to the Elite Eight as defense clamps down in 78-65 win over Kentucky
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Those two regular-season losses to Kentucky don't mean anything to Tennessee now. The Volunteers avenged them in convincing fashion on the big stage of the NCAA Tournament on Friday night, posting a no-doubt 78-65 victory that sent them to a second consecutive Elite Eight.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Michigan State's 2nd-half rally sends Spartans past Ole Miss 73-70 as Izzo wins again in Sweet 16
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Jase Richardson's hot shooting helped Michigan State overcome a poor start and move into another Elite Eight, though the Spartans need at least one more win for a real celebration. “We don’t put up any banners for Elite Eights,” coach Tom Izzo said.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Welcome Down Under: Russian-born Daria Kasatkina becomes an Australian citizen
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Russian-born tennis player Daria Kasatkina says she is switching allegiances to Australia after her application for permanent residency was accepted by the Australian government.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lilia Vu has another bogey-free day and leads a pack of LPGA stars in Arizona
item.description: CHANDLER, Ariz. (AP) — Lilia Vu didn't feel her best on the range. She made up for that on the golf course Friday with an 8-under 64, giving her a two-shot lead over a group that includes Nelly Korda and Jeeno Thitikul in a Ford Championship packed with LPGA stars. Korda and Thitikul, the Nos.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Juan Soto slugs first homer for Mets in win against Astros
item.description: Juan Soto hit his first home run with the New York Mets when he connected in the third inning against the Houston Astros.
item.dc:creator: Kristie Rieken, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Memphis Grizzlies fire Taylor Jenkins, franchise's winningest coach
item.description: The Memphis Grizzlies fired Taylor Jenkins, their winningest coach, on Friday with the team struggling down the stretch and at risk of losing home-court advantage for the postseason. Still sitting at No.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bill Belichick, girlfriend Jordon Hudson team up to mock Falcons over infamous Super Bowl loss
item.description: Bill Belichick still appears to hold a grudge against the Falcons since they decided against hiring him as their coach. So, he trolled them over their infamous Super Bowl loss.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former North Carolina star Tyler Hansbrough takes swipe at Duke after Blue Devils advance to Elite Eight
item.description: UNC lost in the first round of this year's NCAA tournament, and former UNC star Tyler Hansbrough still holds the Tobacco Road rivalry dear and hopes Duke loses in the Elite Eight.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: MiLaysia Fulwiley helps defending champion South Carolina outlast Maryland 71-67 in March Madness
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (AP) — MiLaysia Fulwiley scored 23 points, including a go-ahead layup with 2:22 left, and Chloe Kitts added 15 points and 11 rebounds to help No. 1 seed South Carolina beat fourth-seeded Maryland 71-67 on Friday in the Sweet 16 of the women's NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-Penn State star Abdul Carter makes case for No. 1 pick in NFL Draft
item.description: Former Penn State Nittany Lions star Abdul Carter stated his case for the No. 1 pick on Friday as he spoke to the media at his pro day.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bulls face the Mavericks on 4-game win streak
item.description: Dallas Mavericks (36-38, 10th in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (33-40, ninth in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EDT BOTTOM LINE: Chicago aims to keep its four-game win streak intact when the Bulls take on Dallas. The Bulls are 14-22 in home games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: CF Montreal seeks first win of the season, visits the Chicago Fire
item.description: CF Montreal (0-4-1) vs. Chicago Fire (3-1-1) Chicago; Saturday, 8:30 p.m. EDT BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Chicago -175, Montreal +429, Draw +308; over/under is 2.5 goals BOTTOM LINE: CF Montreal seeks its first victory of the season when it visits the Chicago Fire.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Yankees pay tribute to Miller Gardner, late teen son of former star outfielder
item.description: The New York Yankees paid tribute to 14-year-old Miller Gardner Thursday before their opening day rendezvous with the Milwaukee Brewers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Oluchi Okananwa and Duke beat North Carolina 47-38 to advance to 12th Elite 8 in program history
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (AP) — Oluchi Okananwa recorded her third double-double of the season to lead ACC Tournament champion Duke past North Carolina 47-38 Friday and into the Elite 8 of the women's NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mailbag: Why the Pac-12 expansion calculation depends on media rights, Stanford’s mess, Whittingham’s place of honor and more
item.description: The conference is seeking a media deal before adding a football-playing member but the issues are deeply related.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Trump makes NCAA men's wrestling championships his latest sports-focused trip
item.description: BRIDGEWATER, N.J. (AP) — President Donald Trump attended the NCAA wrestling championships on Saturday night for the second time in three years, the latest example of how he has mostly limited travel early in his new term to trips built around sports events.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Red Rocks win Big 12 Championship
item.description: WEST VALLEY CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The University of Utah claimed the Big 12 regular season and Championship titles during its debut season in the Conference after the Red Rocks tallied a score of 197.775 at the 2025 Big 12 Gymnastics Championship held at the Maverik Center in West Valley City, Utah.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Purdue ends McNeese's March Madness run 76-62 to get back to Sweet 16
item.description: Trey Kaufman-Renn had 22 points and 15 rebounds, and Purdue used a fast start to roll to a 76-62 win over McNeese in the second round of the NCAA Tournament on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego FC are headed to the Lone Star State to take on Austin FC
item.description: San Diego FC are gearing up for Matchday 5 of the MLS season, which will see them head to the Texas capital to take on Austin FC at 1:00 p.m. on Sunday March 23rd.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: No. 12 South Florida Falls To No. 5 Tennessee, 101-66, In The First Round Of NCAA Tournament
item.description: No. 12 seed South Florida (23-11) fell to No. 5 seed Tennessee (23-9), 101-66, in the first round of the NCAA Tournament at Value City Arena on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: USF Athletics, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Vancouver Whitecaps bring shutout streak into matchup with the Chicago Fire
item.description: Chicago Fire (2-1-1) vs. Vancouver Whitecaps FC (4-0-0) Vancouver, British Columbia; Saturday, 10:30 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
